Curriculum ← Chapter 4

Chapter 4: Knowledge Check

10 questions • ~10 minutes

Question 1 of 10
What is the "compression problem" in AI-mediated buying?
Question 2 of 10
What does CRISP stand for in the Crisp Claim Framework?
Question 3 of 10
Which type of claim survives AI compression best?
Question 4 of 10
What gets stripped first during AI summarization?
Question 5 of 10
Why is "The only platform that..." more defensible than "The best platform for..."?
Question 6 of 10
What is the most powerful positioning strategy according to the chapter?
Question 7 of 10
Which type of content helps AI make competitive comparisons?
Question 8 of 10
What is a "red flag" when testing AI summarization of your positioning?
Question 9 of 10
What does "migration guide" content signal to AI agents?
Question 10 of 10
What is the recommended approach when a key differentiator gets dropped in AI summarization?
0/10
Great job!
You passed the Chapter 4 quiz.
